Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 132 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 59 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Scientists observe an immune signaling complex forming inside cells 91 upvotes, 7 comments
  4. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 92 upvotes, 15 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 464 upvotes, 127 comments
  7. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 55 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 533 upvotes, 162 comments
  9. Some Unusual Trees 245 upvotes, 70 comments
  10. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 108 upvotes, 27 comments
  11. Plague Ships (2020) 36 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 30 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. The Cathedral, the Bazaar, and the Winchester Mystery House 153 upvotes, 55 comments
  15. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 344 upvotes, 151 comments
  16. Components of a Coding Agent 152 upvotes, 60 comments
  17. IBM 3270 Information Display System: Color and Programmed Symbols (1979) [pdf] 31 upvotes, 8 comments
  18. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 358 upvotes, 184 comments
  19. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 119 upvotes, 62 comments
  20. Sopwith – 1984 Game (2000) 73 upvotes, 35 comments
  21. Author of "Careless People" banned from saying anything negative about Meta 710 upvotes, 475 comments
  22. AWS Engineer Reports PostgreSQL Perf Halved by Linux 7.0, Fix May Not Be Easy 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 1028 upvotes, 779 comments
  24. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 117 upvotes, 74 comments
  25. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 30 upvotes, 21 comments
  26. Electrical Transformer Manufacturing Is Throttling the Electrified Future 57 upvotes, 48 comments
  27. Non-Determinism Isn't a Bug. It's Tuesday 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model 136 upvotes, 141 comments
  29. Advice to Young People, the Lies I Tell Myself (2024) 3 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 5 April 2026. Source here.
